reviews.comment:
No aceptan APP de YPF (según ellos no tienen sistema) solo se puede pagar en efectivo (raro...), tampoco tienen nafta súper... (otra vez raro), saquen sus conclusiones. A mí me suena a avivada para hacerse de efectivo previo a la navidad. Esto lo escribo el 23 de dic de 2021

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept the YPF app (according to them, their system is down), you can only pay in cash (strange...), they don't have premium gasoline either... (another strange thing), draw your own conclusions. To me, it sounds like a scam to make some cash before Christmas. I'm writing this on December 23, 2021.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOHBIV0dnEAE
